title: Global Sections to the new "HTML" templates + image fields should be reviewed

posts.author: JavierTech (Javier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good day,
Is there a way to add the option for Global Sections to the new “HTML” templates in SuperMail, so we don’t have to configure them repeatedly in different emails?

I believe this would be a great alternative to save time and reduce errors when setting up various templates.
I also think the image fields should be reviewed, as images lose quality when uploaded.
